learnings.summary: claude: CLI "claude" rejected flags ["--effort","low","--model","haiku","-p","--no-input"]: error: unknown option '--no-input'.
claude: CLI "claude" rejected flags ["--model","haiku","-p","--no-input"]: error: unknown option '--no-input'. Update HEADLESS_F

When testing two branches side by side with worktrees, dispatch two parallel agents (one per branch) instead of running everything sequentially in one thread. Each agent can set up its worktree, install deps, start its dev server, and run tests independently.

When research or parallel work is needed, ALWAYS use the DevOps Pilot orchestrator (POST /api/orchestrator/spawn) to dispatch worker agents (Gemini, Codex, Grok, etc.) instead of using built-in subagent/Agent tools. The orchestrator is the correct dispatch mechanism; built-in agents bypass it and the user cannot see the work in the orchestrator UI.

Run-Query.ps1 in DevOps Pilot takes -File (path to a .ps1 file), not -Query (WIQL string). It is a script runner, not a WIQL executor. Write WIQL logic into a .ps1 in .ai-workspace first, then pass the path via -File.
learnings.detail: Error: A parameter cannot be found that matches parameter name Query. The script just does & $File after validating the file exists.

learnings.summary: Before calling an endpoint, verify it exists in the documented API reference. Guessed routes return 404 and waste a round-trip. When a field you want to filter on is not supported as a query parameter, pull what is available and filter the rest in memory.
